subcodes.first_line: O bird of the Rose-garden of Fidelity! Be of no cheerless heart; have no wing nor feather broken; sigh not, neither do thou wail
subcodes.first_line_orig: ای طائره گلشن وفا دل آزرده مباش و بال و پر شکسته مدار آه و فغان مکن و افسرده
subcodes.subjects: @consolation and comfort, @soul; spirit after death, @happiness; joyfulness; joy and sorrow
